headline: The Energy ETF NDIV paid 44% returns this year, but dividends may not last
summary: Amplify Energy & Natural Resources Covered Call ETF (NYSEARCA:NDIV) targets 10% or greater total annualized income by pairing high-dividend energy and natural resource stocks with covered call option premiums. That dual-income pitch draws investors who want commodity-sector exposure without sacrificing yield. Whether that income stream is durable is a different question. Two Income Streams, One ... The Energy ETF NDIV paid 44% returns this year, but dividends may not last

headline: Is ONEOK (OKE) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether ONEOK at around US$83.51 offers fair value or if you are paying a premium for its track record, this breakdown will help you make sense of the current price. The stock's recent moves include a 3.1% decline over both the last 7 days and 30 days, set against returns of 12.3% year to date, 2.2% over 1 year, 47.4% over 3 years and 114.9% over 5 years. Recent attention on ONEOK has focused on how its share price performance compares between longer term holders and...
